implementationGroups.title: Verification and evidence policy
requiredBehaviors: Verify the phase's implemented behavior with focused tests, manual/emulator evidence, or explicit verificationEvidence.
riskHints: target tests only count as strong evidence when backed by latest test gate PASS or explicit harness blocker
build pass alone does not close per-feature behavior
manual review evidence must point to concrete target endpoints
acceptanceEvidence: Update source-coverage-matrix.json after implementation with targetEndpoints, tests, parityLevel, and verificationEvidence.
If tests cannot run, record the concrete harness blocker instead of claiming test PASS.

matchedGroups.title: Onboarding pager and progress flow
requiredBehaviors: Pager state is preserved within the onboarding session.
Final step transitions to login only after the last page.
riskHints: Accompanist pager is source-specific; do not copy its API shape into the target.
acceptanceEvidence: Page indicators and next button behavior match source progression semantics.
uiContracts: next action advances page or routes to login

matchedGroups.title: Login and logout session flows
requiredBehaviors: Credential entry updates local field state immediately.
Incorrect credentials keep the user on the login page with an error message.
Login and logout both mutate the persisted login state service.
riskHints: Do not replace snackbar feedback with silent failure.
Do not infer real authentication or network behavior that does not exist in source.
acceptanceEvidence: Target tests verify successful and unsuccessful login outcomes.
Build gate passes for phase-03-onboarding-login-profile.
uiContracts: valid login routes to home and clears back stack
logout routes to onboarding and clears back stack
dataContracts: login flag toggles through the persisted session service

coordinationNotes: Prefer extending existing route/navigation/state surfaces over creating parallel shells.
If a shared surface must change, keep the change minimal and update only evidence rows tied to this group.
